title: U.S. tech companies ramp up government lobbying amid Iran war uncertainty
summary_full: A White House spokesperson told CNBC the administration had been working with industry leaders to mitigate disruption brought about by the conflict.
summary_public: A White House spokesperson told CNBC the administration had been working with industry leaders to mitigate disruption brought about by the conflict.
